description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests-6.0.3 that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a Couchbase 6.0.3 service. Configure core dump capturing, install build environment, check out the repository with submodules, set up Ruby 2.6, install dependencies with bundle install, initialize Couchbase, compile the extension, display the library version, check Couchbase, and run tests with a 15-minute timeout.
